title: Software Update - DFU - Headset low battery: dialog stays when HS is turned off
scenario: DFU low battery dialog persists on screen after headset is turned off, and does not auto-dismiss on Settings page
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Connect a Poly Bluetooth headset with battery level less than 5%.
4. Observe the DFU low battery dialog appears on screen.
5. Press the Power button on the headset to turn it off while the DFU low battery dialog is still open.
6. Observe the dialog behavior on screen.
7. Navigate to the Settings page (Home → Settings).
8. Connect a Poly Bluetooth headset with battery level less than 5% again.
9. Observe the DFU low battery dialog appears on the Settings page.
10. Press the Power button on the headset to turn it off while the dialog is open on the Settings page.
11. Observe the dialog behavior and the page state.
expected: When the headset is turned off while the DFU low battery dialog is open on the Home/Device Settings screen, the dialog should close automatically and the user should remain on the Settings page for the disconnected device.
